response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong systems instincts, low-latency service experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, and demonstrated geospatial work through GISCollective. However, the role explicitly requires modern C++ or Rust as the primary stack, and the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) with no recent commercial C++ or any Rust experience. Core strengths are in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Worth a screening call to probe C++ depth and willingness to ramp, but not a strong technical match on the primary requirement.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Strong fundamentals: testing, TDD, Linux, distributed systems exposure
concerns: No recent modern C++ experience; last C/C++ role was ~2015
No navigation/routing-specific or tiling pipeline background
